researched_category.notes: QuickBooks Online is a cloud-based accounting platform. The QuickBooks Online API provides programmatic access to accounting data including customers, invoices, bills, payments, accounts, and financial reports.

one_liner.value: Cloud accounting platform providing REST APIs for managing business finances, including customers, invoices, bills, payments, accounts, and financial reports.

methods.notes: QuickBooks Online API uses OAuth 2.0 exclusively. The Authorization Code flow is used with client ID and client secret obtained from the Intuit Developer Portal. Access tokens expire in 1 hour; refresh tokens last 100 days. Bearer tokens are included in the Authorization header.

access.notes: Developer account is free with immediate sandbox access. Under the Intuit App Partner Program (launched July 2025), the free Builder tier includes 500,000 CorePlus (read) API calls/month; exceeding that blocks further reads. Paid tiers (Silver $300/mo, Gold $1,700/mo, Platinum $4,500/mo) offer higher limits and premium API access. Writing data (Core API) is free and unlimited. Gold/Platinum have minimum active connection requirements (500/3,000). Program available in US, UK, Australia, and Canada (excl. Quebec).

summary.value: The QuickBooks Online Accounting API is a RESTful API covering 29+ entity types (customers, invoices, bills, payments, accounts, vendors, employees, items, journal entries, etc.) with full CRUD operations and SQL-like querying, plus 11 financial reports (Balance Sheet, P&L, Cash Flow, Trial Balance, etc.). Webhooks are supported for real-time event notifications. The API has comprehensive documentation, SDKs, and an API Explorer. An official MCP server exists (intuit/quickbooks-online-mcp-server) with 144 tools.

agent_interface.notes: Intuit maintains an official QuickBooks Online MCP server on GitHub (intuit/quickbooks-online-mcp-server) with 144 tools covering 29 entities and 11 reports. Composio has a QuickBooks toolkit. Community MCP servers also exist. Intuit provides official SDKs for several languages. The official MCP server supports Claude Code and other MCP-compatible clients.

rationale.value: QuickBooks Online has a well-documented, public REST API with OAuth 2.0 authentication, broad entity coverage (29+ types), and an official MCP server from Intuit with 144 tools. Developers can sign up for a free Intuit Developer account, get sandbox access immediately, and start building. The free Builder tier supports 500K read calls/month, sufficient for development and light production. The only material limitation is the metered CorePlus (read) API pricing for high-volume production use, but this does not block building an agent toolkit — it's a scale consideration. An agent toolkit for QuickBooks is fully buildable today.

s1.quote: QuickBooks Online is a cloud accounting platform exposing a RESTful Accounting API for accessing company data programmatically.
s1.title: QuickBooks Python API Docs

s2.quote: This MCP server provides complete QuickBooks Online API integration for Claude Code and other MCP-compatible clients. It includes full CRUD operations for 29 entity types and 11 financial reports, giving you comprehensive access to QuickBooks Online functionality.
s2.title: intuit/quickbooks-online-mcp-server

s3.quote: The Quickbooks MCP server is an implementation of the Model Context Protocol that connects your AI agent and assistants like Claude, Cursor, etc directly to your Quickbooks account.
s3.title: Quickbooks MCP Integration for AI Agents

s4.quote: OAuth 2.0 is Intuit's standard authorization protocol.
s4.title: Authorization and authentication

s5.quote: Refresh tokens are only for getting new access tokens.
s5.title: QuickBooks API OAuth 2.0 and authorization FAQ

s6.quote: All apps are automatically enrolled in the Intuit App Partner Program at the Builder tier. ... The Builder tier is an uncharged tier. However, the Builder tier is subject to a capped limit of CorePlus API calls.
s6.title: Intuit App Partner Program FAQ

s7.quote: Builder Tier (Free) - Monthly Fee: $0 - CorePlus API Credits: 500,000 per month - Overage: API calls are blocked after exceeding the 500,000 limit
s7.title: QuickBooks API Pricing and the Intuit App Partner Program

s8.quote: A QuickBooks developer account is free. You can sign up at the Intuit Developer Portal and get immediate sandbox access.
s8.title: How Much Does the QuickBooks API Cost? (2026 Pricing & Rate Limits)

s9.quote: The QuickBooks Online Accounting API is based on the REST framework.
s9.title: Basic schema and data formats for the QuickBooks Online Accounting API

s10.quote: The QuickBooks Online MCP Server acts as a bridge, enabling AI agents and other Model Context Protocol (MCP) clients to seamlessly interact with QuickBooks Online accounting data.
s10.title: QuickBooks Online MCP Server for AI Accounting Data Management

limitations: Some Intuit Developer portal pages are JavaScript-rendered and could not be fully retrieved as text; however, sufficient content was obtained from cached/search excerpts.
Pricing information for Gold/Platinum tiers cited from a third-party aggregator (Apideck) rather than directly from Intuit's page, though the official Partner FAQ confirms the tier structure.
The exact count of entity types (29) is from the official Intuit MCP GitHub repo, which is authoritative.
